text: American Express reported record-breaking Q3 2025 results, with revenue reaching $10.42 billion and net income of $2.90 billion, representing year-over-year growth of 0.91% and 0.59% respectively from Q3 2024 levels. The company lifted its full-year guidance on strong business momentum, according to investment analysis published on November 12, 2025. Net margin for Q3 2025 stood at 27.86%, demonstrating continued profitability despite moderating revenue growth rates compared to earlier quarters in 2025.
